entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being screened for resistance to aphids and rosette virus

entities.name: APHID RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist infestation by Aphis craccivora

entities.description: The aphid vector that transmits the rosette virus and feeds on groundnut

entities.name: GROUNDNUT ROSETTE UMBRAVIRUS
entities.description: The virus causing rosette disease in groundnut

entities.name: ROSETTE VIRUS RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist the groundnut rosette umbravirus

entities.name: SCREENHOUSE STUDY
entities.description: The controlled environment used to compare breeding populations and control varieties

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INFESTATION
entities.description: The process of intentionally introducing aphids to the plants for screening

entities.name: ICG 12991
entities.description: A specific groundnut genotype that exhibited low aphid nymph development and fecundity

entities.name: NYMPH DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The rate of growth and development of aphid nymphs on the host plant

entities.name: FECUNDITY
entities.description: The reproductive capacity of the aphid population on the host plant
